caption: A man wearing a black baseball cap, black t-shirt, and over-ear headphones speaks into a professional studio microphone. He is seated in a podcast studio setting with a white wall behind him featuring a repeated gold star motif and the text "EMPIRE HUSTLE". To his right, a screen displays a logo with the word "BOSS". On-screen graphics appear at the bottom of the frame, including a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and a chest-area overlay on his shirt that says "CHECK IT". As the sequence progresses, the man gestures with his hands while speaking, moving from an open-handed gesture in the initial frames to a more relaxed posture with his arms down in the final frames. His facial expression remains focused as he maintains a conversation with someone off-screen, while the background and technical equipment remain static.
